It does not look inside `src/TypeSpec/`.\\n\\n2. **Convention mismatch.** Every other TypeSpec-based package in the repo (e.g., `Azure.AI.ContentSafety`, `Azure.Communication.Messages`, `Azure.Search.Documents`, etc.) places `tsp-location.yaml` at the package root.\\n\\n3. **Automated workflows may fail.** Any CI or automation that relies on the standard file location will not discover the Responses package\\u0026#39;s TypeSpec configuration.\\n\\n## Current workaround\\n\\nThe custom `scripts/Generate-Contracts.ps1` pipeline works because it navigates directly to the `src/TypeSpec/` directory. However, this doesn\\u0026#39;t fix discoverability for repo-wide tooling.\\n\\n## Suggested fix\\n\\nMove `tsp-location.yaml` from `src/TypeSpec/` to the package root (`sdk/agentserver/Azure.AI.AgentServer.Responses/`) and update `Generate-Contracts.ps1` to reference the new location.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57748\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"JoshLove-msft\",\"id\":54595583,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/JoshLove-msft\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/54595583?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Client\",\"AI Agents\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-02T19:48:43Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-02T19:50:19Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
